name: python3-jsonschema-specifications
title: python3-jsonschema-specifications
summary: JSON Schema meta-schemas and vocabularies, exposed as a Registry
description:
JSON Schema meta-schemas and vocabularies, exposed as a Registry
This package contains JSON support files from the JSON Schema Specifications
(metaschemas, vocabularies, etc.), packaged for runtime access from Python as
a referencing-based Schema Registry.
.
This package contains the Python 3.x module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-jsonschema-specifications because JSON Schema meta-schemas and vocabularies, exposed as a Registry.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-jsonschema-specifications as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-jsonschema-specifications with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-jsonschema-specifications --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
